questions.question: Describe the difference between a strong entity type and a weak entity type in the context of Conceptual Data Modelling. Provide an example to illustrate your answer.

questions.question: An entity set A contains 10 records of customers, while entity set B contains 5 records of orders. What type of relationship exists between entity sets A and B?
Design an ER diagram to represent the following relationship between entities: 'an order has multiple items, but an item is associated with only one order'.
